pack_name: Energy and Power Sector Compliance Overlay
description: Sector-specific screening controls for South African electricity generation, transmission, distribution, trading, embedded generation, gas, petroleum pipeline, safety, technical, metering, customer protection, and regulatory compliance documents.

metadata.scope: South Africa-only sector overlay controls for Energy and Power Sector Compliance Overlay. Intended to be used with south_africa_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official South African legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Occupational Health and Safety Act, 1993
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / Department of Employment and Labour

primary_sources.name: Consumer Protection Act, 2008
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / National Consumer Commission

rules.title: NERSA electricity licence, registration, or exemption evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for NERSA licence, electricity generation/transmission/distribution/trading registration, import/export authorization, or exemption evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Tariff, pricing, or approved-charge evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for tariff approval, pricing methodology, municipal tariff, regulated charge, wheeling charge, or customer tariff disclosure evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Grid-code, connection, metering, or technical-compliance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for grid code, connection agreement, metering, technical compliance, network service provider, or embedded-generation compliance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Energy-sector health, safety, or environmental controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for OHS, electrical safety, environmental management, incident reporting, emergency response, or hazard controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Customer complaint, service quality, or consumer-disclosure evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for customer complaint, quality of supply/service, disconnection notice, consumer disclosure, or redress evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
